title: Klsts' Nether Utilities
description: Adds biome-specific features to Nether Biomes
body:
Have you ever felt the Nether Biomes don't have much things to do once you explore them once? No reaseon to revisit them?

This mods aims to make the Nether expirience more enjoyable by adding cool resources and features to Nether biomes.

 

There 3 new resources, which can only be found in their respective biome and can't be placed anywhere else (like Budding Amethyst) . This resources are:

 

Crimson Truffles. Found on fallen fungi on Crimson Forests. When eaten will extinguis the player.
Warped Truffles. Found on fallen fungi on Warped Forests. When eaten will despawn nearby Endermen.
Ignite. Found on Ignite Crystals on Basalt Deltas. Has many uses, such as creating a block which crystallices lava nearby!

![Truffles on fallen fungi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88d56a8de0a5df47b480326b2618edd21678b663.png)

 

 

Also there is a new structure called the Bone Temple, which has a Bone Vault that spawns loot multiple times when feeding it bones.

![The Bone Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dfdc12d438b934140faf55ca4b9a7cd03962ca6.png)

 

There are other features which generate in all the Nether, to make it more fun to explore (some of them also have loot!).

![Gold Ruin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaad36d92029c0aa5c72ff7287937da3e6da0503.png)

And finally there are new biome specific mobs, to enhance the atmosfere of the biomes. Theese are:

![Babilin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4be49c79144c9b6025c10308fd016d0ae7977f9e.png)![Zombified Babilin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd8badcbc030644780e28d89692fffce9dddc9a9.png)![Necrodraco](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b2bb3cec78ba8faa631a3eec174974014513a97.png)![Magnemone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f99b58a8345bbc63d10c3d92cabab8809eb1dff4.png)


 Also other important changes:
   - Piglins can now barter Netherites Hoes (1 in 500) and other items of the mod
   - Added some items of the mod to Nether Fortresses loot

I hope you like the mod! Any feedback is apreciated!

This mod is made using Mcreator.
